title: Contract Manager[ 5.5 days/East/Construction/Civil/Background in Quantity Surveying (QS) or Contracts ]
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate closely with the Managing Director to respond to Requests for Quotation (RFQs) from both local and international clients.
  • Oversee and coordinate the preparation of pre-tender documentation, manage responses to tender clarifications and amendments, and participate in tender meetings leading to the award process.
  • Prepare and manage contract documentation to ensure effective contract administration, including reviewing commercial terms with clients and subcontractors.
  • Support Project Managers in preparing monthly progress claims and ensure timely and successful collection of payments.
  • Attend site meetings when required to align with project staff on contractual and commercial matters.
  • Assist in the preparation of variation orders, and maintain comprehensive records of work changes and design modifications.
  • Liaise with main contractors and clients’ Quantity Surveyors on claims, negotiations, and final account settlements.
  • Work with directors, project managers, and the financial controller to prepare project budgets and cash flow projections.
  • Negotiate subcontractor packages and assist in drafting subcontractor and supplier agreement letters.
  • Analyze project and contract scopes for effective administration, including interpretation of architectural and shop drawings.
  • Coordinate with the financial controller and project managers to monitor project costs and manage overall financial administration.
  • Provide historical cost data and analysis to support contract negotiations and budgeting processes.

Job Requirements:

  • Strong interpersonal and people management skills with excellent communication and negotiation abilities.
  • Self-motivated, analytical, and capable of working independently.
  • Background in Quantity Surveying (QS) or Contracts is advantageous.
  • Possess at least a Diploma, Bachelor’s Degree, or equivalent qualification in Civil Engineering or a related discipline.
  • Minimum of 5 years of experience in civil engineering works.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office, MS Project, Primavera, and AutoCAD.
  • Able to commence work immediately or within a short notice period.

Our services range from general staffing, executive search, temporary & contract hiring, project hiring, and HR outsourcing services, ensuring that we are equipped to meet the diverse needs of organizations of all sizes. Our commitment to excellence and delivering value to our clients sets us apart in the industry. Whether you're looking to expand your team or take your company to the next level, LinkedCorp is the partner you can trust to help you achieve your goals.
